*
温持：我发现我所处的地方是一本小说，那个名义上的“作者亲妈”竟然想让我先勾搭男主，再从他身上把资源抢过来。她低估我了，不用勾搭，我照样可以抢过来。
我见到那个所谓的“亲妈”了。长得人畜无害、美丽动人，这样的小白花竟然会创造出来我这样的人。
直到某一天，我发现她皮下和她表面不一样。果然，能创造出我这样的人，怎么可能是一朵小白花？她好香、好软……好想抱她、亲她
*
苏荇：泥巴，为什么别人穿书带系统，我说穿就穿？呵呵，穿就算了还被下药，我谢谢全世界。
我见到了笔下的那个女鹅，不得不说，果然是我一点点创造的人，每一处对我而言都完美得不像话。为了维持一个善良长辈的形象，我不得不装起了小白花。不对，主要原因是因为我想戏耍温持。
可是我没想到，装小白花的代价就是被她按着亲。
泥巴，我才是这本书的造物主，被人掌控是什么鬼？
避雷：
1.女频百合
2.有言情副c，含其他性向
3.道德制高点判官不适宜
前期主角疯批、带点强制，后期学会爱人，两人都变得柔和","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/4cc82b4fb7b45b657b18bbed13fd5c8e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"递炤","author_id":"","book_id":"7558108764327398462","book_name":"穿进自己写的小说，被女主亲懵了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f0e0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3084人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":704,"name":"双女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=704&name=双女主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":853,"name":"白切黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=853&name=白切黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":484,"name":"HE","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=484&name=HE&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7558138557093642814","read_count":"3084","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"248848"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"117","tags":"双女主,纯爱,现代,穿书,白切黑,HE","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4cc82b4fb7b45b657b18bbed13fd5c8e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779507028&x-signature=57brN4QdHfRRgR52eQTtQXoocdA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3027401369988440","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"222"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241130282F7E27790BC69CF77255"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读13小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":
